name: OpenAI
thesis: Leading frontier AI developer (GPT-4, o1). $80B+ valuation, $3.4B+ revenue run-rate. Exclusive Microsoft infrastructure partnership.

name: Anthropic
thesis: Constitutional AI developer behind Claude models. $20B+ valuation with significant backing from Google and Amazon.

name: xAI
thesis: Elon Musk's AI venture developing Grok models. $24B valuation. Building massive Colossus datacenter in Memphis.

name: Mistral AI
thesis: French LLM developer with competitive open models (Mistral, Mixtral). $2B valuation, strong EU backing.

name: DeepSeek
thesis: Chinese LLM developer with high-performance models rivaling Western frontier labs. ~$5B+ estimated valuation.

name: Cohere
thesis: Enterprise-focused LLM APIs with multilingual models. $5.5B valuation, IPO pending.

name: Palantir Technologies
thesis: AI/ML-powered data analytics for enterprise & government. AIP platform driving rapid commercial growth. $77B market cap, $2.2B revenue.

name: Salesforce
thesis: Enterprise CRM leader with Einstein AI and Agentforce. $282B market cap, $38B+ revenue. AI features driving upsell.

name: ServiceNow
thesis: Enterprise workflow platform with deep AI/ML integration. $265B market cap, $10B+ revenue. AI driving workflow automation.

name: Snowflake
thesis: Cloud data platform enabling AI/ML workloads. $56B market cap, $3.7B revenue. Cortex AI features driving data-native AI.

name: Databricks
thesis: Lakehouse platform unifying data + AI infrastructure. $43B valuation, $1B+ ARR. MLflow ecosystem leader.

name: UiPath
thesis: RPA leader integrating AI/ML for enterprise automation. $20B market cap, $1.3B revenue.

name: Hugging Face
thesis: Central hub for open-source ML models, datasets, and inference. $2B valuation. Essential infrastructure for AI development.

name: Scale AI
thesis: Data labeling and AI platform for autonomous systems and LLM training. $7.3B valuation. Government + enterprise contracts.

name: Weights & Biases
thesis: ML experiment tracking and model optimization platform. $1B+ valuation, $200M+ ARR.

name: Groq
thesis: Inference optimization with custom LPU chip architecture. $2.8B valuation. Ultra-low latency inference.

name: Together AI
thesis: Open-source model inference & optimization platform. $200M+ Series B funding.

name: Fireworks AI
thesis: Optimized LLM inference API platform. $130M+ Series B funding.

name: Synopsys
thesis: Dominant EDA tools provider critical to AI chip design. $80B market cap, $6.6B revenue. AI-powered chip design tools.
catalysts: AI chip design complexity driving EDA demand

name: Cadence Design Systems
thesis: Leading EDA tools for chip design, simulation, and verification. $53B market cap, $3.9B revenue.

name: CrowdStrike
thesis: Cybersecurity leader with AI/ML-powered threat detection. $84B market cap, $3.1B revenue. Charlotte AI platform.

name: Harvey
thesis: AI legal assistant for corporate law firms. $765M valuation. Deep integration with major law firms.

name: Cursor
thesis: AI-native code editor gaining rapid developer adoption. ~$100M+ valuation. Competing with GitHub Copilot.

name: Microsoft
thesis: Largest cloud infrastructure operator (Azure) with massive AI datacenter buildout. $80B+ annual CapEx planned. Azure AI revenue accelerating at 39% YoY.

name: Amazon / AWS
thesis: AWS leads cloud infrastructure with Trainium custom AI chips and massive global datacenter footprint. $200B 2026 CapEx planned.
catalysts: Trainium AI chip deployment at scale

name: Google / Alphabet
thesis: TPU custom silicon leader with vertically integrated AI infrastructure. GCP growing 48% YoY. $175-185B 2026 CapEx guidance.

name: Meta
thesis: Massive AI infrastructure investor with open-source Llama strategy. $115-135B 2026 CapEx. 5 GW Hyperion campus planned.
catalysts: Peak CapEx year → margin expansion post-2026

name: Oracle
thesis: Aggressive OCI expansion with Stargate partnership. AI infrastructure revenue +243% YoY. $553B RPO backlog.
risks: Late entrant to hyperscale cloud (<5% share)

name: CoreWeave
thesis: Pure-play GPU cloud provider. $66.8B backlog but $29.8B debt with 8.94x leverage. FY2025 revenue $5.13B (+168%).

name: Lambda
thesis: GPU cloud provider focused on AI/ML workloads. Growing enterprise customer base for training and inference.

name: Equinix
thesis: Largest global colocation provider with 260+ datacenters in 72 metros. Critical interconnection hub for AI workloads.

name: Digital Realty
thesis: Major datacenter REIT with global portfolio. PlatformDIGITAL for AI workloads. Strong leasing momentum from hyperscaler demand.

name: Constellation Energy
thesis: Largest US nuclear fleet operator. Premium clean baseload provider to hyperscalers. Nuclear PPAs with major tech companies.

name: Vistra Energy
thesis: Diversified power generator with nuclear fleet. Comanche Peak nuclear assets positioned for datacenter PPAs.

name: NextEra Energy
thesis: Largest US renewable energy generator with growing datacenter power supply portfolio. Solar, wind, and battery storage.

name: AES Corporation
thesis: Global power company with growing renewable portfolio and datacenter energy supply contracts.

name: GE Vernova
thesis: Leading gas turbine manufacturer benefiting from massive datacenter power demand. Record backlog as hyperscalers secure reliable baseload generation.
catalysts: Natural gas bridge to clean energy

name: Siemens Energy
thesis: Major gas turbine OEM with growing datacenter power demand. Gamesa wind issues being resolved. Grid infrastructure exposure.

name: Eaton
thesis: Diversified electrical infrastructure leader. $9.5B Boyd acquisition strengthens integrated power/cooling portfolio. 11-year datacenter backlog.

name: Schneider Electric
thesis: Global leader in power management and automation for datacenters. Galaxy UPS systems, PDUs, and building management.

name: Fluence Energy
thesis: Battery energy storage solutions provider. Growing demand from datacenter backup power and grid storage applications.

name: Tesla Energy
thesis: Megapack utility-scale battery storage gaining traction for datacenter backup and grid stabilization. Energy segment growing rapidly.

name: Centrus Energy
thesis: Only US company licensed to produce HALEU fuel needed for advanced nuclear reactors (SMRs). Critical bottleneck position.

name: Cameco
thesis: Largest Western uranium producer. Nuclear renaissance driven by datacenter power demand creates structural uranium demand.

name: NuScale Power
thesis: Only SMR with full NRC design certification. 77 MWe per module. Pre-revenue with minimal engineering income.

name: Oklo
thesis: Fast reactor developer with Meta 1.2 GW commitment. Materials license approved March 2026. $2.5B cash provides 25+ year runway.

name: TerraPower
thesis: Bill Gates-backed Natrium sodium-cooled reactor. 345 MWe. Construction started in Wyoming. Meta partnership.

name: Kairos Power
thesis: Fluoride salt-cooled reactor (Hermes). Construction permit for test reactor. Google agreement signed.

name: X-energy
thesis: HTGR (Xe-100) developer with 80 MWe per module. AWS partnership. NRC review underway.

name: NVIDIA
thesis: Dominant AI GPU provider powering the datacenter buildout. Blackwell architecture driving unprecedented demand. Data center 80%+ of revenue.

name: AMD
thesis: Growing AI GPU challenger with MI300X/MI350 ramp. Data center revenue accelerating as hyperscalers diversify GPU supply.

name: Broadcom
thesis: Custom AI ASIC leader (Google TPU, Meta MTIA). Networking infrastructure critical for datacenter interconnect.

name: Intel
thesis: Turnaround play with Gaudi AI accelerators and 18A process node. Foundry services ambitions. CHIPS Act beneficiary.

name: Micron Technology
thesis: HBM leader benefiting from AI GPU memory demand. HBM3E supply sold out through 2025-2026.
catalysts: AI-driven memory content increase per server

name: SK Hynix
thesis: Leading HBM manufacturer and NVIDIA's primary HBM supplier. HBM3E production leader with strong pricing power.

name: Samsung Electronics
thesis: World's largest memory manufacturer catching up in HBM. Foundry + memory combination unique in industry.
risks: HBM quality gap vs SK Hynix

name: Arista Networks
thesis: Premium datacenter networking leader. 400G/800G switch demand from AI clusters. CloudVision AI-driven network management.

name: Cisco Systems
thesis: Networking giant with Splunk acquisition expanding AI observability. Silicon One chips for AI datacenter fabric.

name: Amphenol
thesis: High-quality electrical connector compounder with exceptional datacom growth. Q1 2026 revenue +49% YoY.

name: Corning
thesis: Optical fiber and connectivity solutions leader. Datacenter fiber demand surging from AI cluster interconnects.

name: Super Micro Computer
thesis: Leading AI server/rack manufacturer with direct liquid cooling. Building Block architecture for rapid custom configurations.

name: Dell Technologies
thesis: Leading AI server OEM with PowerEdge platform. Infrastructure Solutions Group driving growth from enterprise AI deployments.

name: HPE
thesis: Enterprise AI infrastructure provider with Juniper Networks acquisition expanding networking portfolio.

name: Celestica
thesis: Pure-play datacenter hardware manufacturer. 1.6T networking platform. $17B 2026E revenue guidance (+37%).

name: Vertiv
thesis: Dominant thermal management and power distribution leader for AI datacenters. $13.75B revenue guidance (+34%). 11+ year backlog.

name: Asetek
thesis: Liquid cooling specialist for AI datacenters. Direct-to-chip and rear-door heat exchanger solutions.
catalysts: AI GPU power density driving demand

name: TSMC
thesis: Sole advanced node manufacturer for AI chips. 3nm/2nm process leadership. Arizona fab expansion for US supply chain.
catalysts: AI chip demand driving ASP increases

name: Intel Foundry Services
thesis: Intel's foundry division pursuing external customers with 18A process. CHIPS Act funding. Execution challenges significant.

name: UMC
thesis: Mature-node foundry serving power management, analog chips used in datacenter infrastructure.

name: GlobalFoundries
thesis: Specialty foundry for RF, analog, and power chips used in datacenter and networking infrastructure.

name: ASML
thesis: Monopoly on EUV lithography systems essential for advanced AI chips. Every AI chip passes through ASML equipment.
catalysts: AI chip demand driving fab expansion

name: Applied Materials
thesis: Largest semiconductor equipment maker. Deposition, etch, and inspection tools critical for AI chip manufacturing.
catalysts: ICAPS (IoT, Comm, Auto, Power, Sensors) growth

name: Lam Research
thesis: Leading etch and deposition equipment provider. Critical for HBM and advanced memory manufacturing.

name: KLA Corporation
thesis: Dominant semiconductor inspection and metrology equipment. Defect detection critical as AI chip yields drive profitability.

name: Tokyo Electron
thesis: Major semiconductor equipment maker (coater/developer, etch, deposition). Key supplier to TSMC, Samsung, Intel fabs.

name: ASE Technology
thesis: Largest OSAT (outsourced assembly and test) provider. Advanced packaging critical for AI chip performance (CoWoS, 2.5D/3D).
catalysts: Advanced packaging demand from AI chips

name: Amkor Technology
thesis: Major OSAT provider with growing advanced packaging capabilities. Apple, Qualcomm, and AI chip packaging.

name: Entegris
thesis: Specialty materials and contamination control for semiconductor manufacturing. Critical consumable supplier as yields matter more.

name: Shin-Etsu Chemical
thesis: World's largest silicon wafer manufacturer. Every semiconductor starts with a wafer. Pricing power from oligopoly position.

name: Aehr Test Systems
thesis: Niche test equipment maker with SiC wafer-level burn-in systems. Benefits from SiC adoption in datacenter power conversion.
catalysts: SiC power device adoption in datacenters

name: onsemi
thesis: Power semiconductor enabler for AI datacenter infrastructure. SiC devices for power conversion. $6B buyback authorization.
catalysts: AI DC revenue expanding at high-teens rate

name: Infineon
thesis: European power semiconductor leader with growing datacenter power management exposure. SiC and GaN technologies.

name: STMicroelectronics
thesis: Infrastructure semiconductor play with AWS partnership and NVIDIA 800V DC power collaboration. Revenue ramping $500M to $1B+ in DC.

name: Wolfspeed
thesis: SiC wafer and device manufacturer. Mohawk Valley fab challenges but long-term SiC demand strong for datacenter power.
catalysts: SiC adoption for datacenter power supplies
risks: Cash burn and balance sheet stress
